answer.text: Only the financial statements of the largest company in the industry
All players in the industry including competitors, customers, suppliers, regulators, and emerging technologies
Only the government regulations applicable to the industry
Only the stock price charts of listed companies in the sector

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Industry landscaping is comprehensive — studying all players (competitors, customers, suppliers), regulators, and emerging technologies to understand the full competitive landscape. **The Trap:** It goes beyond just financials, regulations, or stock charts. It's a holistic view of all forces affecting the industry. **Cross-Exam Context:** Industry landscaping tested in NISM Series XV Chapter 6. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Use frameworks like Porter's Five Forces, PESTLE, and BCG Matrix to structure your industry landscaping systematically.
